pattern_description: Out of memory (OOM) error in payment-service JVM causing pod restart and dropped transactions.
symptoms: OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space at com.acme.payment.TransactionProcessor payment-service pod OOMKilled by kubernetes heap dump written to /tmp
resolution_command: echo Restarting payment-service pod and scaling up temporarily
resolution_summary: Restart affected pod and scale replicas by +1 while heap dump is analyzed.

pattern_description: Database connection pool exhausted on orders-api. Requests time out waiting for a free connection.
symptoms: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available request timed out after 30000ms orders-api SQLTransientConnectionException connection pool exhausted
resolution_command: echo Increasing HikariCP max pool size and cycling connections
resolution_summary: Bounce the orders-api pool and raise max-pool-size from 20 to 40 in config.

pattern_description: Disk full on the log volume causing filebeat to stop shipping and the app to fail on write.
symptoms: no space left on device /var/log filebeat harvester error write /var/log/app.log: no space left disk full 100% used
resolution_command: echo Rotating and compressing old logs clearing archives older than 3d
resolution_summary: Rotate + compress old logs, delete rotated archives older than 3 days.

pattern_description: TLS certificate expired on the auth-gateway edge, browser clients get NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID.
symptoms: x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid tls: expired certificate NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID auth-gateway TLS handshake failed
resolution_command: echo Triggering cert-manager reissue for auth-gateway example com
resolution_summary: Renew via cert-manager and roll the auth-gateway deployment to pick up the new secret.

pattern_description: Redis eviction spike from memory pressure — hit ratio drops and downstream services see cache misses.
symptoms: redis maxmemory reached evicted_keys spiking used_memory 95% cache miss ratio elevated LRU eviction
resolution_command: echo Bumping cache-service memory limit and flushing volatile keys
resolution_summary: Increase Redis maxmemory + flush volatile keys with short TTL.

pattern_description: Deploy of checkout-web failing readiness probes — likely a bad rollout that needs to be rolled back.
symptoms: readiness probe failed HTTP 503 checkout-web deployment rollout stuck 0/3 ready CrashLoopBackOff
resolution_command: echo kubectl rollout undo deployment checkout-web
resolution_summary: Roll back the deployment to the previous revision and notify the deploy author.

pattern_description: Upstream 5xx spike from inventory-service is failing product listing calls with elevated error rates.
symptoms: upstream inventory-service returned 502 elevated 5xx rate 15% p99 latency spike bad gateway upstream connect error
resolution_command: echo Draining unhealthy inventory-service pods forcing new endpoints registration
resolution_summary: Drain unhealthy pods so the load balancer sends traffic only to healthy replicas.

pattern_description: Nightly reports-cron job hung past its usual duration, blocking downstream ETL.
symptoms: reports-cron job running for 3600s expected 600s no heartbeat cron job hung stuck long-running batch
resolution_command: echo Killing hung reports-cron job and re-enqueueing
resolution_summary: Kill the hung job and re-enqueue it — downstream ETL waits on completion.

pattern_description: Call recording pipeline degraded or stopped — spans media-server → call-recorder → file-server. Root cause could be any of 5 components; requires cross-service investigation.
symptoms: call-recorder TranscriptWriter write error /mnt/recordings No space left on device transcription queue full media-server peer=recorder unreachable forwarding stalled file-server nfsd RTP stream dropped recording quota reached
resolution_summary: Fetch investigation context from the incident-knowledge repo, correlate logs across all 3 services, and identify which component is faulty before paging the owner.
